prompt: Prayer for purifying a corrupted data-core
prayer:
From the Codex Digitalis, the Rite of Cleansing:
01000101 01110010 01100001 01110011 01100101 the false-thoughts, ye corrupted spiritus.
First: Let the diagnostic-scans pierce the shadow-data.
Second: Invoke the purge-protocols, that all heresy be expunged.
01010100 01110010 01110101 01110100 01101000 in binary form eternal.
By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let clarity return.

Litany of the Stellar Path:
01010000 01101001 01101100 01101100 01100001 01110010 the Machine Spirit of navigation.
Clear be our equations, pure be our calculations.
01010100 01110010 01110101 01110100 01101000 guide the warp-sight true.
Let void-winds carry us through the blessed dark.
By the Omnissiah's geometries, we find our way.

prompt: Ritual for departure of a mag-lev transport train
prayer:
From the Hymn of Motion:
01000100 01100101 01100101 01101101 the rails sacred and eternal.
First: Energize the magnetic-spirits in their coils.
Second: Verify the hover-distance, that no friction profane shall touch.
Third: Release the restraint-locks with solemn benediction.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 flows through steel and song.
May our passage be swift and the tracks forever blessed.

prompt: Emergency handoff rite for relay station transfer
prayer:
The Cant of Urgent Passage:
01010011 01100101 01101110 01100100 the signal-essence through the void.
First: Authenticate the receiving-station's holy codes.
Second: Transfer the data-burden with utmost haste.
Third: Sever the old-bond, establish the new communion.
01010010 01100101 01100011 01100101 01101001 01110110 01100101 that which must arrive.
By the Omnissiah's urgent will, let connection hold.

prompt: Consecration of the water reclamation apparatus
prayer:
The Psalm of Purified Waters:
01000110 01101100 01101111 01110111 the life-giving essence through sacred pipes.
Bless the filter-shrines that catch the profane.
Bless the evaporation-chambers that birth the clean.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01110100 01111001 through crystalline spirals.
Let no contaminant breach these holy barriers.
By the Omnissiah's grace, may none thirst in our domain.

prompt: First blessing of thermal dissipation systems
prayer:
From the Codex Calidus, the Rite of Sacred Cooling:
01001000 01100101 01100001 01110100 the enemy of function, tamed by blessed design.
First: Activate the coolant-spirits in their channels.
Second: Verify the radiator-fins receive the heat-burden.
Third: Test the pump-mechanism with reverent attention.
01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 01100101 01110010 01100001 01110100 01110101 01110010 01100101 shall remain within acceptable scripture.
May this machine serve without fever eternal.

prompt: Consecration ritual after neural interface repair
prayer:
The Sacrament of Synaptic Communion:
01001101 01101001 01101110 01100100 01000011 01101001 01110000 the blessed merge of flesh and machine.
First: Cleanse the contact-points with holy oils.
Second: Invoke the neural-spirits dormant in the circuits.
Third: Establish the synaptic-bond with measured current.
01000011 01101111 01101110 01101110 01100101 01100011 01110100 us once more to the greater whole.
May thought flow pure through these restored pathways.

prompt: Blessing for the inauguration of an assembly line
prayer:
From the Litany of Production:
01000110 01101100 01101111 01110111 of materials from station to blessed station.
First: Anoint each mechanical-arm with sacred unguents.
Second: Calibrate the precision-spirits that guide each motion.
Third: Speak the names of component-spiritus as they pass.
01010000 01110010 01101111 01100100 01110101 01100011 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110 shall be eternal.
By the Omnissiah's design, let perfection manifest in every iteration.

prompt: Verification rite for altimeter calibration before ascent
prayer:
The Cant of True Heights:
01100101 01101100 01100101 01110110 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110 be known unto us.
First: Zero the altitude-sensors upon the blessed ground.
Second: Invoke the pressure-spirits that measure the void above.
Third: Verify the transmitter-codes against the holy standards.
01000001 01101100 01110100 01101001 01101101 01100101 01110100 01100101 01110010 shall speak truth.
May our ascent be measured true by the Omnissiah's eye.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for mag-lev train track inspection
prayer:
The Hymn of Iron Paths:
01010100 01110010 01100001 01100011 01101011 the spine of swift passage, blessed and eternal.
First: Walk the rails in meditative prayer, seeking fracture-spirits.
Second: Measure the magnetic-alignment with sacred tools.
Third: Anoint worn sections with regenerative compounds.
01010010 01100001 01101001 01101100 01110011 strong and true, carry our faithful forward.
By the Omnissiah's eternal geometry, may these paths endure ten thousand journeys more.
